title: Expressions
intro: This is not a single-medium portfolio page, but an entry point into the works. Visual pieces, sound, recordings of creations made for love, and cross-medium expressions that I do not want to classify separately for now all begin here.
Hover to preview a category first, then click to enter its page.

categories.title: Visual Art
categories.card_description: Physical works, images, material experiments, visual narratives.
categories.preview_text: Physical works, images, material experiments, visual narratives. For now, it keeps the original placeholder draft and turns it into a formal category page.

categories.title: Music
categories.card_description: Music box covers and original pieces. Commissions are open.

categories.title: Made for Love
categories.card_description: Gameplay videos, dance covers, fan videos. Not commercial work, but responses left behind after certain works lit something up in me.
categories.preview_text: Gameplay videos, dance covers, fan videos. Broader than ‘anime fandom,’ and better able than ‘fanwork’ to hold what I want to place here right now.
